verses.1: The Song of songs, which is Solomon’s.
verses.2: Let him kiss me with the kisses of his mouth;
verses.3: Your oils have a pleasing fragrance.
verses.6: Don’t stare at me because I am dark,
verses.7: Tell me, you whom my soul loves,
verses.8: If you don’t know, most beautiful among women,
verses.9: I have compared you, my love,
verses.10: Your cheeks are beautiful with earrings,
verses.11: We will make you earrings of gold,
verses.12: While the king sat at his table,
verses.13: My beloved is to me a sachet of myrrh,
verses.14: My beloved is to me a cluster of henna blossoms
verses.15: Behold, you are beautiful, my love.
verses.16: Behold, you are beautiful, my beloved, yes, pleasant;
verses.17: The beams of our house are cedars.
